skill.name: firebase-ai-logic
skill.description: Integrate Firebase AI Logic (Gemini in Firebase) for intelligent app features. Use when adding AI capabilities to Firebase apps, implementing generative AI features, or setting up Firebase AI SDK. Handles Firebase AI SDK setup, prompt engineering, and AI-powered features.
skill.summary: Integrate Firebase AI Logic (Gemini in Firebase) for intelligent app features. Use when adding AI capabilities to Firebase apps, implementing generative AI features, or setting up Firebase AI SDK.
skill.author: supercent-io

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 24 potential security issues, all are false positives. External commands are code block examples in documentation (not executable). Network URLs are legitimate Firebase documentation links. Environment access is a placeholder in instructional code with explicit warnings against hardcoding secrets. No executable code present - this is pure documentation. Safe to publish.

content.user_title: Integrate Firebase AI Logic for Smart Apps
content.value_statement: Add generative AI features to Firebase apps using Gemini. This skill helps you set up Firebase AI SDK, implement text generation and image analysis, and configure security rules for production-ready AI-powered applications.
actual_capabilities: Set up Firebase AI SDK with proper configuration
Implement text generation using Gemini models
Create streaming AI responses for real-time applications
Build multimodal AI features combining text and images
Configure Firebase Security Rules for AI endpoints
Follow best practices for prompt engineering and error handling
limitations: Requires active Firebase project with AI Logic enabled
API calls incur costs based on Firebase AI pricing
Network connectivity required for AI model inference
Rate limiting and quota management must be implemented manually

use_cases.title: Content Generation Platform
use_cases.description: Build a blog or content platform that uses AI to generate summaries, rewrite articles, or translate content into multiple languages automatically.

use_cases.title: AI-Powered Customer Support
use_cases.description: Create intelligent chatbots that understand customer queries and provide contextual responses using Firebase AI for natural language understanding.

use_cases.title: Image Analysis Application
use_cases.description: Develop apps that analyze images for accessibility, extract text from photos, or categorize visual content using multimodal AI capabilities.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me set up Firebase AI Logic for my web app. I need to install the SDK, configure Firebase, and make my first API call to generate text.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new Firebase project with AI features

prompt_templates.title: Implement Streaming
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me how to implement streaming AI responses in my Firebase app. I want users to see the AI response generate word by word in real-time.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building real-time chat or content generation features

prompt_templates.title: Multimodal Image Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to analyze images with Firebase AI. Help me implement a function that takes an image URL and prompt, then returns AI-generated analysis of the image.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating image recognition or visual search features

prompt_templates.title: Security Rules Configuration
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me write Firebase Security Rules for my AI endpoints. I need to ensure only authenticated users can access AI features and protect against abuse.

output_examples.input: Help me add Firebase AI to my React app for text summarization
output_examples.output: I'll help you integrate Firebase AI Logic for text summarization in your React app. First, install the required packages: npm install firebase. Then initialize Firebase with your config, get the AI instance, and create a summarize function that calls model.generateContent(). I'll provide complete TypeScript code with error handling and a React hook for calling the summarization feature.

output_examples.input: Show me how to set up streaming AI responses
output_examples.output: For streaming responses, use model.generateContentStream() instead of generateContent(). This returns an async iterable that yields chunks as they arrive. I'll show you how to process the stream using for await...of loop, handle errors, and display the streaming text in your UI. This provides a better user experience for longer AI responses.

output_examples.input: I need to implement image analysis with Firebase AI
output_examples.output: To analyze images, use the multimodal capabilities of Gemini. Construct an imagePart object with inlineData containing the base64-encoded image and mimeType. Pass both your text prompt and the imagePart to generateContent(). I'll provide code for converting images to base64, handling different image formats, and processing the analysis results.

best_practices: Store API keys in environment variables and never commit them to version control
Implement rate limiting on your backend to control Firebase AI costs and prevent abuse
Use specific prompts and provide context to improve AI response quality and reduce token usage
Cache AI responses when appropriate to avoid redundant API calls for identical requests
anti_patterns: Hardcoding Firebase configuration or API keys directly in source code files
Sending sensitive user data or personal information to AI models without consent
Allowing unlimited AI API calls without implementing any rate limiting or cost controls
Skipping error handling which can cause app crashes when AI services are unavailable

faq.question: What is Firebase AI Logic?
faq.answer: Firebase AI Logic is a service that integrates Google Gemini AI models directly into Firebase. It provides SDKs for web, mobile, and server-side platforms to add generative AI features like text generation and image analysis to your applications.

faq.question: Do I need a separate API key for Firebase AI?
faq.answer: No, Firebase AI uses your existing Firebase project configuration. You enable AI Logic in the Firebase Console and use the same Firebase initialization. However, AI calls are billed separately based on usage.

faq.question: Can I use Firebase AI with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude Code. Claude can help you implement Firebase AI features, write code for AI integration, and configure your project structure. The skill provides templates and best practices for AI implementation.

faq.question: What are the costs of using Firebase AI?
faq.answer: Firebase AI Logic uses pay-as-you-go pricing based on the number of tokens processed. Text generation and image analysis have different rates. Check the Firebase pricing calculator for detailed estimates based on your expected usage.

faq.question: How do I secure my AI endpoints?
faq.answer: Use Firebase Security Rules to restrict AI API calls to authenticated users. Implement rate limiting on your backend. Never expose your Firebase config with unrestricted access. Validate user input before sending to AI models to prevent injection attacks.

faq.question: Can I use Firebase AI offline?
faq.answer: No, Firebase AI Logic requires network connectivity to make API calls to Google servers. The AI models run on Google infrastructure, not locally. Ensure your app handles network errors gracefully when AI features are unavailable.
